creator: jp_ambriz@hotmail.com
text:
I did a fresh install in a much newer PC (Ryzen 5, RX 6650) and got the same error.

Opened the Dodge the Creeps example and set a breakpoint at line 7 $ScoreTimer.stop() started it and trigger a game over.

But the same happens even in an empty project with just print("anything")

Maybe it isn't godot but a setting or permission?

In the Ryzen 5 I made no changes just installed the minimal packages to get a desktop (xorg, amdgpu, xfce)
